title: Column center shortcut in the product switcher menu

posts.author: kmckenzie26 (Kae McKenzie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The only way to open the column center is when adding a column in a board. If you want to manage any Managed Columns you have to go through a board. Given there is a shortcut to the template center, a shortcut to the column center wouldn’t be out of place and would remove a lot of friction.

What are you trying to achieve

Quickly make changes to column templates or managed columns without having to go through a specific board.
